name: Shenyang Machine Tool Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenyang Machine Tool Co., Ltd. provides cutting, milling, boring, and drilling solutions. The company offers horizontal and vertical lathes, and turning and milling centers; and special machinery, such as pipe thread, axle, differential case, hub, pipe coupling, sucker rod, and wheelset machines, as well as flexible machining units using turning in place of grinding. It also provides gantry type machining, horizontal milling and boring machining, vertical machining, and high speed machining centers; CNC milling and boring lathes/machining centers; and CNC drilling machines. It serves automobile, wind energy, aviation, coal mine machinery, shipbuilding, electronics, rail transport, and engineering machinery industries. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Shenyang, China.
